claims.claim: A premium grain-free cat food with a blend of chicken, turkey, and trout, designed to meet the nutritional needs of adult cats.
claims.evidence: This premium canned food for cats, known for its balanced nutrition and feast of flavors, ensures your cat gets a diet as yummy as it is healthy. Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout.

claims.claim: The formulation philosophy at Instinctive Choice focuses on providing high-quality proteins and balanced nutrition for adult cats.

claims.evidence: Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth...
Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth, Turkey...
Ingredients: Chicken, Chicken Liver, Chicken Broth, Turkey, Trout...

claims.claim: Grain-free formula: This product is free from grains, catering to cats with dietary restrictions or preferences.
claims.evidence: - Grain free - Carrageenan free - BPA free recyclable can - No corn, wheat or soy |

claims.claim: Rich in moisture for hydration: The added moisture ensures your cat stays well-hydrated and happy. Hydration is crucial for urinary health.
claims.evidence: We understand hydration is crucial for your cat's urinary health. That's why Instinctive Choice is crafted with added moisture, ensuring your furry friend stays well-hydrated, happy, and in tip-top shape through all life stages.

claims.claim: Soft pate-style texture: With a soft, pate-style texture, this canned food guarantees content purrs and clean bowls.
claims.evidence: - Soft, pate-style texture, gone are the days of your cat turning their whiskers up at mealtime! Content purrs and clean bowls are guaranteed.

claims.claim: Suitable for adult cats: Feed 1 to 1 1/4 cans per 6-8 lbs. of body weight per day.
claims.evidence: For adult cats, feed 1 to 1 1/4 cans per 6-8 lbs. of body weight per day.

claims.claim: Supports urinary health: The added moisture in the formulation helps maintain your cat's hydration levels, supporting overall urinary health.
claims.evidence: We understand hydration is crucial for your cat's urinary health. That's why Instinctive Choice is crafted with added moisture, ensuring your furry friend stays well-hydrated, happy, and in tip-top shape through all life stages.

claims.claim: Competitive pricing compared to other premium brands.
claims.evidence: This comparison has been created by Life's Abundance and is meant to illustrate the differences in pricing between pet food it provides under the mark Life’s Abundance® and those provided by other companies. All entries related to pricing have been made on the basis of information available January 2023.
